request_params.name: bizType
request_params.description: Business type deposit: Deposit withdraw: Withdrawal transfer_in: Transfer-in transfer_out: Transfer-out trade_in: Asset purchase trade_out: Asset sale rake_back_reward: Commission rebate reward airdrop_reward: Financial airdrop reward rr_agent_reward: Referral commission reward launch_pad_airdrop_in: LaunchPool airdrop transfer in launch_pad_airdrop_out: LaunchPool airdrop transfer out system_issued: System issued airdrop_reward_for_product_activity: Product activity airdrop reward red_packet_create: Red packet creation red_packet_claim: Red packet claim red_packet_refund: Red packet refund

request_params.name: pageSize
request_params.description: Number of results to return, default 10, maximum 100

response_params.name: hasNextPage
response_params.description: Whether there is a next page

response_params.name: bizType
response_params.description: Business type deposit: Deposit buy_success: Buy coin success sell_cancel: Sell cancel withdraw_freeze: Withdrawal freeze withdraw_complete: Withdrawal complete withdraw_failed: Withdrawal failed sell_freeze: Sell freeze sell_complete: Sell complete transfer_in: Transfer in transfer_out: Transfer out internal_deposit: Internal deposit internal_withdraw: Internal withdrawal interest_receive: Interest receive wxt_retrieve: WXT staking asset retrieval wxt_lock: WXT lock wxt_unlock: WXT unlock wxt_lock_reward: WXT staking reward c2c_buy: P2P buy c2c_sell: P2P sell c2c_freeze: P2P freeze c2c_unfreeze: P2P unfreeze

request_params.name: after
request_params.description: Pass to tradeTime and retrieve the data before this tradeTime.

request_params.name: before
request_params.description: Pass to tradeTime and retrieve the data after this tradeTime.

response_params.name: toSymbol
response_params.type: Trading pair of the recipient account

response_params.name: fromSymbol
response_params.type: Trading pair of the sender account

request_params.name: > depositConfirm
request_params.type: Number of block confirmations required for deposits

request_params.name: > withdrawConfirm
request_params.type: Number of block confirmations required for withdrawals

request_params.name: > browserUrl
request_params.type: Blockchain explorer URL for the network

request_params.name: data
request_params.required: Trading pairs supported for API trading

response_params.name: supportPlanMarket
response_params.description: Whether market orders are supported in conditional orders

request_params.name: type
request_params.description: Default: step0: no aggregation.Values: step0, step1, step2, step3, step4, step5

request_params.name: orderIds
request_params.description: Either Order ID or clientOids is required.

request_params.name: clientOids
request_params.description: Either Client customized ID or orderIds is required.

request_params.name: orderId
request_params.description: Either Order ID or clientOid is required.

request_params.name: clientOid
request_params.description: Either Client customized ID or orderId is required.

request_params.name: pageSize
request_params.description: Page size, must be greater than 0 and less than or equal to 100 (Default: 10)

request_params.name: orderId
request_params.description: Either Order ID or clientOrderId is required.

request_params.name: clientOrderId
request_params.description: Either Client customized ID or orderId is required.

request_params.name: side
request_params.description: Order direction buy: Buy sell: Sell

request_params.name: orderType
request_params.description: Order type limit: Limit order market: Market order

request_params.name: force
request_params.description: Order execution type (It is invalid when orderType is market) normal: Normal limit order, good till cancelled postOnly: Post-only order (maker only) fok: Fill or kill ioc: Immediate or cancel

request_params.name: pageSize
request_params.description: Page size, must be greater than 0 and less than or equal to 100 (Default: 10)

request_params.name: limit
request_params.description: Number of records to retrieve. Must be greater than 0 and less than or equal to 100.

request_params.name: startTime
request_params.description: Start timestamp in UTC (milliseconds). Default: 7 days ago,Max range: 3 months

request_params.name: endTime
request_params.description: End timestamp in UTC (milliseconds). Default: current time,Max range: 3 months

request_params.name: startTime
request_params.description: Start timestamp in UTC (milliseconds) (Only data from the past month can be queried)

request_params.name: endTime
request_params.description: End timestamp in UTC (milliseconds) (Only data from the past month can be queried)

request_params.name: fromAccountType
request_params.description: Type of the originating account (SPOT: spot wallet, FUND: funding wallet, Default: SPOT)

request_params.name: toAccountType
request_params.description: Type of the target account (SPOT: spot wallet, FUND: funding wallet, Default: SPOT)

response_params.name: status
response_params.description: Possible values: SUCCESS FAILED PROGRESSING: Processing

request_params.name: fromAccountType
request_params.description: Type of the originating account (SPOT: spot wallet, FUND: funding wallet, Default: SPOT)

request_params.name: toAccountType
request_params.description: Type of the target account (SPOT: spot wallet, FUND: funding wallet, Default: SPOT)

response_params.name: netTradingFee
response_params.description: Net Trading Fee Collected by Platform
